title: TÜFAM (Turkish World Philosophy Research and Application Center)
content:
TÜFAM (Turkish World Philosophy Research and Application Center)

By clicking on the headings below,

TÜFAM (Turkish World Philosophy Research and Application Center)

you can easily access relevant contents in the field.

Related Faculties

What We Aim For

Our Center was established to carry out all kinds of research, study and publication activities in the fields of philosophy, science, culture, art and education produced in the Turkish cultural basin on a national and international scale; to organize and participate in scientific activities related to these fields in Turkey and abroad.

At the same time, our center aims to introduce the personalities who have left their mark in the Turkish cultural basin, to conduct research on the works and ideas of these personalities, and to carry out inventory studies on books, articles, documents and other archival materials related to these issues.

Another important goal is to cooperate with individuals, institutions and organizations conducting research and education in Turkey and abroad in relation to our field of activity.

What We Will Do

To support educational and research activities in line with the objectives of the Center.

To cooperate with national and international organizations in line with the objectives of the Center.

To organize symposiums, conferences and workshops related to the field.

To publish academic journals, books and similar publications related to the field.

To organize seminars, conferences, television programs and similar events.

To support students, educators, professional people and institutions who will conduct research and investigation studies.

To provide research, examination, consultancy and similar services to institutions and organizations in the public and private sectors within the framework of the issues within the field of study of the Center.

To conduct applied philosophy studies in solving world problems.

To carry out other studies in accordance with the objectives of the Center.
